---
title: "LRP76: Longitudinal-ordering mediation — letter sounds (t2) → word reading (t4)"

date: last-modified
date-format: "YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm:ss Z"

format:
  html:
    code-fold: true
    theme: cosmo
    number-sections: true
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    code-links:
      - repo
---

{{< include _partials/_header.qmd >}}
{{< include _partials/_setup.qmd >}}
{{< include _partials/_gate_badge.qmd >}}
{{< include _partials/_key_findings.qmd >}}
{{< include _partials/_reading_guide.qmd >}}

## Overview

Every contemporaneous mediation model measures the mediator and the outcome at the *same*
wave (t2), so it cannot establish temporal precedence — the weakness the DAG's §12 flags and
scopes to a wave-unrolled workstream (issue #250). Those models carry a t3 *sensitivity*
(mediator at t2, outcome at t3). LRP76 promotes that ordering to the **primary** estimand and
pushes the separation to the maximum the panel allows: the mediator (letter-sound knowledge
$L$) stays at t2, the outcome (word reading $W$) is taken at **t4**, so the mediator strictly
precedes the outcome by two waves. (The t3 sensitivity is skipped — it would double-lag.)

## Design

Mediator $L_{t2}$ (Beta-Binomial on $L_{t1}$); outcome $W_{t4}$ (conditioned on $W_{t1}$,
loaded via the lagged-outcome preparation). Adjustment $\{G, A, E, R, W_\text{pre}, L_{t1}\}$
— identical to [LRP59](../lrp-rli-med-059).

## Assumptions — read this first {#sec-assumptions}

The **t2 → t4 increment is NOT randomised** — by t4 both arms have been treated (the wait-list
has crossed over), so this is a **triangulation design** for the temporal-precedence question,
read under stated assumptions, **not** a cleaner causal estimate than the contemporaneous
LRP59. It is a within-current-design longitudinal check, and is explicitly *not* the full
wave-unrolled cross-lagged model (issue #250), which additionally handles time-varying
confounding. ID-2 applies throughout; the NIE is an adjusted association under a stated forward
direction. $n \approx 53 \Rightarrow$ wide intervals.

{{< include _partials/_results_mediation.qmd >}}
{{< include _partials/_priors.qmd >}}
{{< include _partials/_prior_predictive.qmd >}}
{{< include _partials/_technical.qmd >}}
{{< include _partials/_footer.qmd >}}
